primary_sources.name: Federal Register - CMS Rules and Regulations
primary_sources.relevance: Official source for all CMS proposed and final rules affecting nephrology practice

primary_sources.name: CMS ESRD Prospective Payment System Final Rule
primary_sources.relevance: Annual updates to ESRD payment rates and quality measures

primary_sources.name: Medicare Physician Fee Schedule Final Rule
primary_sources.relevance: Annual updates to physician payment rates and quality reporting requirements

primary_sources.name: Regulations.gov Public Comment Portal
primary_sources.relevance: Official platform for submitting public comments on proposed federal rules

secondary_sources.name: American Society of Nephrology Policy Updates
secondary_sources.relevance: Professional society analysis and advocacy positions on federal regulations

gaps: Limited guidance on systematic monitoring workflows for nephrology practices
Lack of standardized impact assessment tools for proposed rule changes
